payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts.

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.

tool_args.label: April 2025 - May Timetable and Track Work Programs

payload.event_name: May Timetable and Track Work Programs
payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules and of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.
The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Summer of 2025.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Summer of 2025.
This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2025.

tool_args.label: July 2025 - September Timetable and Track Work Programs

payload.event_name: September Timetable and Track Work Programs
payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules and of MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.subject: Committee Chair
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Approval of Minutes at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: President's Report at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators
payload.subject: Chief Safety Officer
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Safety Report at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Operations Report at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Financial Report at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Ridership Report at each monthly LIRR Committee meeting.
